query_text:
recreates the given shape + its horizontal and vertical diameters.

Constraint - Use these variables strictly:
radius=100
ground_truth_code:
t.circle(radius)
t.circle(radius, 90)
t.left(90)
t.forward(2 * radius)
t.left(90)
t.circle(radius, 90)
t.left(90)
t.forward(2 * radius)
model_response:
radius = 100
t.penup()
t.goto(0, -radius)
t.pendown()
t.circle(radius)
t.penup()
t.goto(-radius, 0)
t.pendown()
t.goto(radius, 0)
t.penup()
t.goto(0, -radius)
t.pendown()
t.goto(0, radius)

query_text:
creates exactly the same shape.

Constraint - Use these variables strictly:
radius=100
